signals.raw: **No Confirmed Resolution**: Talks collapsed over disagreements—Iran proposed a 5-year nuclear suspension vs. US demand for 20 years—with VP Vance blaming Iran and Iran citing US "excessive demands"; blockade is active but Iranian ships have crossed[3].
